work_unit: H-004 path traversal fix in POST /inbox/upload
situation: audit-2026-07-02-008 finding H-004 (priority 4): POST /inbox/upload accepts arbitrary filename query param and concatenates directly into inbox path without sanitization. Attacker can supply ?filename=../../etc/cron.d/backdoor.txt to write arbitrary files on disk. Endpoint was previously unauthenticated; opt-security-1782909081 added bearer gate (commit 9beaaff) but the path traversal itself was never fixed despite commit 429baba claiming it.
action: Applied defense-in-depth filename sanitization: (1) Path(filename).name strips directory components, (2) reject if stripped name differs from input (catches ../ and absolute paths), (3) is_relative_to(inbox) as final guard. Stacked as 3rd commit on existing opt-security-1782909081 worktree which already had bearer token gate + claimed-but-missing traversal fix.
outcome_evidence: Commit 1999ffa on auto/opt-security-1782909081 pushed to origin. Diff: +8/-2 lines in api.py inbox_upload handler. Path.name strips traversal, is_relative_to double-checks. Main restored clean (git checkout -- personal_assistant/api.py).
next_suggestion: Next pending fix by priority: M-001 (verify.py _item_counter global mutable race condition) — route-fix, 1 file. Or M-003 (DELETE /chat-log no auth/confirmation) — partially mitigated by H-003 bearer gate but still needs confirmation token for destructive op.

audit_findings.finding: Path traversal: dest = inbox / filename allows ../../ escape from inbox dir
